recent_no_license_projects.name: PySHDL
recent_no_license_projects.summary: SHDL (Simple Hardware Description Language) is a minimal HDL designed for creating digital circuits and easily simulating them. It compiles directly to C for maximum performance and portability. PySHDL is the Python interface for SHDL.

recent_no_license_projects.summary: Tools for easily working with Zarr groups and arrays
